title: Mixed Version Proxy — Enabling Peer-aggregated Discovery and Mixed Version Proxy
text:
Ensure that
UnknownVersionInteroperabilityProxy
feature gate
is enabled when you start the
API Server
:
kube-apiserver
\
--feature-gates
=
UnknownVersionInteroperabilityProxy
=
true
\
# required command line arguments for this feature
--peer-ca-file
=
<path to kube-apiserver CA cert>
--proxy-client-cert-file
=
<path to aggregator proxy cert>,
--proxy-client-key-file
=
<path to aggregator proxy key>,
--requestheader-client-ca-file
=
<path to aggregator CA cert>,
# requestheader-allowed-names can be set to blank to allow any Common Name
--requestheader-allowed-names
=
<valid Common Names to verify proxy client cert against>,
# optional flags for this feature
--peer-advertise-ip
=
`
IP of this kube-apiserver that should be used by peers to proxy requests
`
--peer-advertise-port
=
`
port of this kube-apiserver that should be used by peers to proxy requests
`
# …and other flags as usual
